title: Biomes Client
description: The biomes_client.json file defines client-side visual properties for biomes, including water colors, fog colors, and transparency settings. This file does not use a format_version field.

biomes.title: Biomes
biomes.description:
A collection of biome visual definitions. Keys are biome identifiers (e.g., 'minecraft:plains') or 'default' for fallback settings.

Properties:
• water_surface_color (string)
• water_surface_transparency (float)
• water_fog_color (string)
• water_fog_distance (int)
• fog_color (string)
• fog_identifier (string)
• remove_all_prior_fog (boolean)
• inherit_from_prior_fog (boolean)

water_surface_color.title: Water Surface Color
water_surface_color.description: The color of water surfaces in this biome. Specified as a hex color string (e.g., '#44AFF5').

water_surface_transparency.title: Water Surface Transparency
water_surface_transparency.description: The transparency of water surfaces. 0.0 is fully transparent, 1.0 is fully opaque.

water_fog_color.title: Water Fog Color
water_fog_color.description: The color of fog when underwater in this biome. Specified as a hex color string.

water_fog_distance.title: Water Fog Distance
water_fog_distance.description: The distance at which underwater fog becomes fully opaque.

fog_color.title: Fog Color
fog_color.description: The color of atmospheric fog in this biome. Specified as a hex color string.

fog_identifier.title: Fog Identifier
fog_identifier.description: Reference to a fog definition file that controls fog rendering for this biome (e.g., 'minecraft:fog_default').

remove_all_prior_fog.title: Remove All Prior Fog
remove_all_prior_fog.description: When true, removes all fog definitions that were inherited from prior biomes or defaults before applying this biome's fog settings.

inherit_from_prior_fog.title: Inherit From Prior Fog
inherit_from_prior_fog.description: When true, inherits fog settings from the prior fog stack. When false, uses only this biome's explicit fog settings.
